PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEABURY, BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST MARCUS TJON IS DENIED. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
